name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
benefit: High interest savings account (8.2% p.a.) for girl child, tax-free maturity
benefit_hindi: Beti ke naam 8.2% byaaj wala savings account jo tax-free hai

eligibility.description: Girl child below 10 years of age
eligibility.description_hindi: 10 saal se chhoti beti ke liye
criteria: Girl child must be below 10 years of age
Maximum 2 accounts per family (one per girl child)
Parent or legal guardian can open account
Minimum deposit: ₹250 per year, Maximum: ₹1,50,000 per year
exclusions: More than 2 girl children (exception for twins/triplets)

steps: Visit nearest Post Office or authorized bank
Submit birth certificate and parent Aadhaar
Account opened — deposit yearly for 15 years
Maturity at girl's age of 21 years
steps_hindi: Nearest Post Office ya bank jaayein
Beti ka birth certificate aur parent ka Aadhaar dein
Account khul jayega — 15 saal tak har saal paisa daalein
Beti ke 21 saal hone par poora paisa milega

hindi_summary: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana mein beti ke naam account khol sakte hain. Isme 8.2% byaaj milta hai jo bahut accha hai. Saal mein kam se kam 250 rupaye daalein. Beti ke 21 saal hone par poora paisa tax-free milega. Post Office ya bank mein account khulta hai.
